rows.label: tev001592_MSG0001
rows.name: Doing a little sightseeing, are we?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_JNK0010
rows.name: Reproach[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask the Murderess if she's
instigating fights again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_JNK0020
rows.name: Propose[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask the Murderess to help
you break up the fight.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0002
rows.name:
Your accusation wounds me, [ST:gender p1=sir p2=madam ]! I don't
start EVERY fight in NLA, you know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0003
rows.name: I assure you, I am merely a bystander.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_JNK0110
rows.name: Believe[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_SEL0111
rows.name:
Agree that the Murderess
may not be responsible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_JNK0120
rows.name: Demand[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_SEL0121
rows.name:
Insist that the combatants
should resolve their problems
with words instead of fists.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_JNK0130
rows.name: Suspect[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_SEL0131
rows.name:
Say this is too much of a
coincidence to believe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0004
rows.name:
Your grasp of these situations
is as astute as ever.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0005
rows.name:
Anyway, it looks like the fight
ended while we were talking.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0006
rows.name:
Dammit, Egor! You're useless! You
can't even bring home pocket change![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0007
rows.name:
...Hmm? Oh, I was just
talking to myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0008
rows.name:
Anyway, enjoy your evening and
all that. I'll see you back in
the administrative district.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0009
rows.name: Were you a librarian in a former life?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0010
rows.name:
You must understand that everyone
has their limits, and this city
offers few ways to blow off steam.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0011
rows.name:
Everyone needs a way to release accumulated
stress. Especially the common folk.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0012
rows.name:
Anyway, it looks like the fight
ended while we were talking.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0013
rows.name:
Dammit, Egor! You're useless! You
can't even bring home pocket change![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0014
rows.name:
...Hmm? Oh, I was just
talking to myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0015
rows.name:
Anyway, enjoy your evening and
all that. I'll see you back in
the administrative district.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0016
rows.name:
You truly are a suspicious
person, aren't you? Or am I
really that untrustworthy?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0017
rows.name: Hmm... Actually, I suppose I am.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0018
rows.name:
I'm sure a[ST:gender p1= man p2= woman ] as observant as yourself
has already realized, but I wagered
more than a few credits on this fight.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0019
rows.name:
I'm hopeful that Egor here
will be able to best Daniel.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0020
rows.name:
I'll grant you that it's hardly the Roman
Colosseum, but a city with as little to offer
as NLA needs these sorts of amusements.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0021
rows.name:
Anyway, it looks like the fight
ended while we were talking.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0022
rows.name:
Heh heh. You pulled it off, Egor.
That's 4,000 credits in my pocket.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0023
rows.name:
Well, I'm going home while I'm
still ahead. I'll see you back
at the administrative district.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0024
rows.name: Oh, that certainly wouldn't fly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0025
rows.name:
If we were to stop the fight before
it ended, no one would be satisfied.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0026
rows.name: Except for you, apparently.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0027
rows.name:
Can't you see the poetry in two
men fighting with bare fists?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0028
rows.name:
There are no guns or blades involved.
They waited until a whistle was blown.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0029
rows.name:
It's as orderly and fair a way
as any to resolve a disagreement
in this world of ours.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_JNK0030
rows.name: Accept[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_SEL0031
rows.name:
Admit that there is some truth
in the Murderess's words.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_JNK0040
rows.name: Disagree[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_SEL0041
rows.name:
Insist that they should have
resolved it with words.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0030
rows.name:
Your grasp of these situations
is as astute as ever.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0031
rows.name:
Anyway, it looks like the fight
ended while we were talking.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0032
rows.name:
Dammit, Egor! You're useless! You
can't even bring home pocket change![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0033
rows.name:
...Hmm? Oh, I was just
talking to myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0034
rows.name:
Anyway, enjoy your evening and
all that. I'll see you back in
the administrative district.[ST:wait ]

rows.name: Were you a librarian in a former life?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001592_MSG0036
